description: Manage your plan, usage, and billing.

card.featuresDesc: A complete list of modules and tools active on your plan.

message.pastDue: Your subscription is past due. {{daysLeft}} days left before suspension.

payToContinue.title: Subscription Expired
payToContinue.message: Your subscription has ended. To continue managing your businesswithout interruption, please renew your plan.

planOverviewDesc: Your current subscription status and period.

plans.title: Subscription Plans
plans.description: Choose a plan to renew or upgrade your subscription. Select the billing cycle that best fits your needs.
plans.yearlySavings: 🎉 Best Value: Save 20% with yearly billing
plans.noPlans: No plans available for this billing period.

billing.title: Billing & Payment
billing.transferInstructions: Transfer the exact amount to the following account:
billing.copyHint: Tap the account number to select and copy it

instructions.title: Payment Instructions
instructions.step1: 1. Transfer the exact amount shown above to the account number provided.
instructions.step2: 2. Take a screenshot or photo of your payment receipt / confirmation.
instructions.step3: 3. Send the receipt to our support team via Telegram for manual verification and activation.

billing.notFound: Plan not found. Please go back and select a plan.
